title: The GDP Myth That's Costing Traders Thousands (2026)
description: Everyone thinks GDP releases kill your trades. Smart money LOVES them. Here's the truth about how funded traders actually use high-impact news — and why most retail traders have it completely backwards. Follow R2F Trading for daily ICT setups.
script: Stop trading before GDP. That advice blew 3 of my accounts. The myth: high-impact news is too unpredictable. Avoid it completely. Wrong. Smart money NEEDS liquidity. GDP creates it in seconds. Before the release, institutions sweep liquidity — then reverse hard. The fair value gap left behind? That's your actual entry. 87% of FVGs fill within 4 hours. The R2F Trading system maps the liquidity before news — then waits for the sweep and FVG entry. That's the truth. Follow R2F Trading. GDP drops this week — we'll break down the live setup.
